title: Find the Correct Percentage Basis
summary: Build and verify css percentage units in nested survey panel percentage overflow incident through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.

content.text: A percentage has a property-specific basis. Inline size usually resolves against the containing block’s inline size; percentage block size needs a definite reference; padding and margin percentages use the containing block’s inline size in normal writing modes; transforms use the transformed box. Naming the containing block and property basis prevents viewport guesses. Apply it to nested survey panel percentage overflow incident.
